text:
C: explicit invite, not auto-add [...] - **`tenex-edge invite <slug[@backend]>`** — explicit verb, adds the agent to the current channel. Mentioning `@perf-hawk` in chat does **not** summon it (no stateful side-effect on a name reference).
- **`tenex-edge agents`** — the on-demand summonable roster (slug@backend + "when to use" byline). This is where the roster *enumerates*; `who` shows it too (full snapshot), but the per-turn hook only ever shows the *delta* (new agent appeared).
